title: What the Gutter Remembers
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A homeless woman in contemporary Mumbai writes unsent letters to the mother who abandoned her, tucking them into library books she reads in the archives, unaware that a lonely archivist has been collecting and answering them for twelve years.
long_description: A homeless woman in contemporary Mumbai writes unsent letters to the mother who abandoned her, tucking them into library books she reads in the archives, unaware that a lonely archivist has been collecting and answering them for twelve years.
